build.details: Build completes successfully. Performance warnings are expected and acceptable (editor.js 339KB, screen.js 378KB).

lint.details: ContentWithMedia has only minor warnings: experimental API usage (__experimentalToggleGroupControl, __experimentalInputControl) and useEffect dependency array suggestion. These are consistent across all blocks in the theme and not specific to this block. No critical or major issues.
warnings: Usage of experimental WordPress APIs (standard across theme)
useEffect has missing dependency 'mediaRenderId' (can use functional update, minor)

registration.details: Block registered correctly. block.json has apiVersion 3, correct attribute types, example with innerBlocks. Deprecation handler exists in index.tsx.

attributes.details: All attributes defined correctly. description and buttons attributes removed as planned. InnerBlocks replaced them successfully.

edgeCases.details: Tested minimal content (heading + single paragraph with no buttons), empty eyebrow state, video embed with quote block, dark mode with list, and reversed layout. All edge cases render correctly.
testedCases: Minimal content: heading + paragraph only (no buttons, no eyebrow)
Full content: eyebrow + heading + paragraph + buttons
Dark mode: all content types render with dark background
Reversed layout: media column position swaps correctly
Video embed: YouTube video with poster image and play button
Empty InnerBlocks wrapper: renders correctly when only heading is present

innerBlocks.details: InnerBlocks implementation verified. Discourse wrapper applied correctly. Allowed blocks include core/paragraph, core/list, core/quote, core/separator, takt/button-row. Core/heading correctly excluded. Default template provides paragraph + button-row.
innerBlocks.template: paragraph with placeholder + button-row with primary button

renderVerification.tsx: useInnerBlocksProps({ className: 'discourse' }, { allowedBlocks, template, templateLock: false })

testsRun.details: JS file exists (ContentWithMedia.js) and correctly handles file video playback and YouTube/Vimeo embed injection on play button click.

accessibility.details: Semantic HTML structure correct. Section has aria-labelledby pointing to heading ID. Play button has aria-label. No duplicate content or markup duplication detected.
checks: aria-labelledby on section references heading ID (pass)
Heading hierarchy correct (h2/h3 based on headingSize attribute) (pass)
Discourse wrapper provides semantic prose styling (pass)

markupDuplication.details: No responsive markup duplication detected. Single HTML structure uses Tailwind responsive classes (md:col-start-1, md:col-start-2, etc.) for layout changes.

tsxPhpSync.details: TSX and PHP templates are perfectly synchronized. No manual attribute extraction in PHP (no $attributes['key'] pattern found). @var docblock present for all camelCase variables. Structure, classes, and conditional rendering match exactly.
verifiedSync: ThemeHeading props match (enableDescription=false, enableButtons=false in both) (PASS)
$children conditional rendering matches TSX innerBlocksProps structure (PASS)

deprecation.details: Deprecation/migration handler exists in index.tsx. Converts old description attribute to core/paragraph InnerBlock and old buttons array to takt/button-row with takt/button children. This preserves existing content automatically.
deprecation.migrationFunction: migrate(oldAttributes) converts description string to paragraph block and buttons array to button-row with button children

specCompliance.details: All planning spec requirements met. InnerBlocks render correctly (paragraph, list, quote, button-row). ThemeHeading only handles eyebrow+heading (enableDescription=false, enableButtons=false). Dark mode works with InnerBlocks. Discourse wrapper applied. Test page has 5 block variations covering all scenarios.
specCompliance.expectedVariations: Full content, reversed layout, dark mode with list, video with quote, minimal content

passedChecks: Build passes without errors (only expected performance warnings)
Lint passes for ContentWithMedia (only theme-wide experimental API warnings)
Block registered correctly with correct apiVersion, attributes, and example
description and buttons attributes successfully removed
InnerBlocks replace description/buttons with discourse wrapper
ThemeHeading correctly uses enableDescription=false and enableButtons=false
Allowed blocks include core/paragraph, core/list, core/quote, core/separator, takt/button-row
Core/heading correctly excluded from allowed blocks
Default template provides paragraph + button-row
InnerBlocks render correctly on frontend with discourse class
Dark mode styling applies correctly to InnerBlocks content
isReversed layout works with InnerBlocks
reverseRows (mobile ordering) works with InnerBlocks
Media column (image/video) renders correctly alongside InnerBlocks
Empty InnerBlocks state handled gracefully (conditional rendering in PHP)
Video playback JS works correctly
TSX and PHP templates perfectly synchronized
No manual $attributes['key'] extraction in PHP
@var docblock present for camelCase variables
Deprecation/migration handler exists and converts old content to InnerBlocks
Test page has 5 variations covering all scenarios
All accessibility checks pass (aria-labelledby, semantic HTML, no duplication)
Block preview in inserter works with updated example

innerBlocksRenderCorrectly.evidence: Page audit shows 5 sections, all with discourse wrapper present. Paragraph, list, quote, and button-row all render correctly. Block count tool confirms InnerBlocks structure matches expected patterns.

discourseClassApplied.evidence: All 5 sections have discourse wrapper (extraSelectors.discourse_wrapper: [true, true, true, true, true]). TSX uses useInnerBlocksProps({ className: 'discourse' }), PHP uses <div class="discourse">.

themeHeadingCorrect.evidence: ThemeHeading in both TSX and PHP has enableDescription=false and enableButtons=false. Rendered HTML shows theme-heading wrapper present in all sections with eyebrow and heading only.

darkModeWorks.evidence: Section index 2 has 'dark bg-transparent!' classes applied. Page audit confirms dark mode section renders with InnerBlocks (paragraph + list + button). Text-white applied to content column.

tsxPhpSync.evidence: grep for $attributes[ returns no matches. Both TSX and PHP use same wrapper structure, same classes, same conditional rendering. InnerBlocks wrapper matches exactly.

deprecationExists.evidence: index.tsx has deprecated array with migrate function. Converts description to createBlock('core/paragraph') and buttons to createBlock('takt/button-row', {}, buttonBlocks).

blockCountCorrect.evidence: taktician_wp_count_blocks returned 5 total takt/content-with-media blocks. Structure tree shows all 5 have innerBlocks (paragraph, list, quote, button-row combinations).

buildPasses.evidence: bun run build completed with 3 warnings (performance, expected). No TypeScript errors.
